title: CTOC Refinement Loop Letter
description: JSON schema for the letter CTO Chief sends to test-writer (first) and implementer (second) each round of the refinement loop. Spec: docs/REFINEMENT_LOOP.md

letter_id.description: ULID identifying this letter; same as the dispatch_id in the audit log

round.description: Round number within the current phase (starts at 1)

phase.description: Current phase of the refinement loop

plan.description: Plan slug this loop is refining (e.g., 'freelance-invoices-impl')

summary.description: 2-3 sentence prose framing for human escalation views. Renderer converts to Markdown.

issues.description: Issues to address this round. Length bounded by K * N_critics (K=3/5/7 per phase, N=panel size).

fingerprint.description: Stable identifier across rounds: sha256(critic_id + file + line_range + finding_type)[:12]. Same value across rounds means same issue.

severity.description: Severity classification. Per the warnings-are-bugs principle, all compiler/linter warnings, deprecations, and CVEs of any severity classify as 'critical'.

file.description: Path to the file containing the issue (relative to project root)

line_range.description: Line range [start, end]. Single-element array allowed for single-line issues.

current_behaviour.description: Description of what the code does now (the broken state)

expected_behaviour.description: Description of what the code SHOULD do after the fix (the spec for the test-writer)

observable_test_conditions.description: Given/When/Then style conditions the test must verify. Test-writer asserts these; does NOT see the implementation.

forbidden_in_test.description: Things the test-writer must NOT do (e.g., 'don't assert specific exception class names'). Prevents tests pinning implementation details.

raised_by.description: Critic agent paths that surfaced this finding (e.g., ['security/sast-scanner', 'quality/code-reviewer']). Multiple = corroborated.

related_findings.description: IDs of other findings in the same letter that share a fix (e.g., 'cr-003 — same function flagged for length').
